**[Lawn bowls](/wiki/Bowls "Bowls") men's fours at the [2018 Commonwealth Games](/wiki/2018_Commonwealth_Games "2018 Commonwealth Games")** was held at the [Broadbeach Bowls Club](/wiki/Broadbeach_Bowls_Club "Broadbeach Bowls Club") in the [Gold Coast, Australia](/wiki/Gold_Coast,_Australia "Gold Coast, Australia") from April 9 to 13.[[1]](#cite_note-schedule-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2) A total of 76 athletes from 19 associations participated in the event.

## Sectional play

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Lawn_bowls_at_the_2018_Commonwealth_Games_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_fours&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Sectional play")]

The top two from each section advance to the knockout stage.

### Section A

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Lawn_bowls_at_the_2018_Commonwealth_Games_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_fours&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Section A")]

| Rank | Nation | Athletes | MP | MW | MT | ML | FR | AG | PD | PTS |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | [New Zealand](/wiki/New_Zealand_at_the_2018_Commonwealth_Games "New Zealand at the 2018 Commonwealth Games") | [Ali Forsyth](/wiki/Ali_Forsyth "Ali Forsyth"), [Blake Signal](/wiki/Blake_Signal "Blake Signal"),  [Michael Nagy](/wiki/Michael_Nagy_(bowls) "Michael Nagy (bowls)"), [Paul Girdler](/wiki/Paul_Girdler "Paul Girdler") | 4 | 4 | 0 | 0 | 73 | 37 | 36 | **12** |
| 2 | [Wales](/wiki/Wales_at_the_2018_Commonwealth_Games "Wales at the 2018 Commonwealth Games") | [Jonathan Tomlinson](/wiki/Jonathan_Tomlinson "Jonathan Tomlinson"), [Marc Wyatt](/wiki/Marc_Wyatt "Marc Wyatt"),  [Ross Owen](/wiki/Ross_Owen "Ross Owen"), [Steve Harris](/wiki/Steve_Harris_(bowls) "Steve Harris (bowls)") | 4 | 3 | 0 | 1 | 60 | 35 | 25 | **9** |
| 3 | [Canada](/wiki/Canada_at_the_2018_Commonwealth_Games "Canada at the 2018 Commonwealth Games") | [Cam Lefresne](/wiki/Cam_Lefresne "Cam Lefresne"), [Chris Stadnyk](/wiki/Chris_Stadnyk "Chris Stadnyk"),  [Greg Wilson](/wiki/Greg_Wilson_(bowls) "Greg Wilson (bowls)"), [Ryan Stadnyk](/w/index.php?title=Ryan_Stadnyk&action=edit&redlink=1 "Ryan Stadnyk (page does not exist)") | 4 | 2 | 0 | 2 | 61 | 73 | -12 | **6** |
| 4 | [Papua New Guinea](/wiki/Papua_New_Guinea_at_the_2018_Commonwealth_Games "Papua New Guinea at the 2018 Commonwealth Games") | [Fred Koesan](/w/index.php?title=Fred_Koesan&action=edit&redlink=1 "Fred Koesan (page does not exist)"), [Gabriel Tika](/w/index.php?title=Gabriel_Tika&action=edit&redlink=1 "Gabriel Tika (page does not exist)"),  [Manu Walo](/w/index.php?title=Manu_Walo&action=edit&redlink=1 "Manu Walo (page does not exist)"), [Polin Pomaleu](/w/index.php?title=Polin_Pomaleu&action=edit&redlink=1 "Polin Pomaleu (page does not exist)") | 4 | 0 | 1 | 3 | 53 | 66 | -13 | **1** |
| 5 | [Cook Islands](/wiki/Cook_Islands_at_the_2018_Commonwealth_Games "Cook Islands at the 2018 Commonwealth Games") | [Adoni Wichman-Rairoa](/w/index.php?title=Adoni_Wichman-Rairoa&action=edit&redlink=1 "Adoni Wichman-Rairoa (page does not exist)"), [Aidan Zittersteijn](/wiki/Aidan_Zittersteijn "Aidan Zittersteijn"),  [Lawrence Paniani](/w/index.php?title=Lawrence_Paniani&action=edit&redlink=1 "Lawrence Paniani (page does not exist)"), [Munokokura Pita](/w/index.php?title=Munokokura_Pita&action=edit&redlink=1 "Munokokura Pita (page does not exist)") | 4 | 0 | 1 | 3 | 34 | 70 | -36 | **1** |

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Lawn_bowls_at_the_2018_Commonwealth_Games_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_fours&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Section B")]
